'''Ashala Ma-dred''' was one of the four [[Marriage/Legends|wives]] of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Sha-Mar Ma-dred]] of [[Kashir]]. When the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] were asked by the King to help in protecting his wives, Ashala stole [[Anakin Skywalker's first lightsaber/Legends|Skywalker's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] while he was distracted by her beauty to lure him to her to test his integrity. Unknown to both, Kenobi had used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to recover the lightsaber and only returned it once Skywalker admitted to its disappearance.
